title: White Suspended Ceilings Tiles 595mm x 595mm x 7mm - EasyClean & Wipeable - Fits in 600mm x 600mm Grid System Pack of 10 Ceiling Panels Tile for 3.6m2 Area

EasyClean & Wipeable - Fits in 600mm x 600mm Grid System

description: Product Description Item Specification Product: Ceiling Expert Suspended Vinyl Ceiling Tiles Compatibility: Size 595mm x 595mm x 7mm - Fit into 600 x 600mm Grid System EasyClean and Wipeable Waterproof for Added Durability Packaging: 10 Tiles Per Box Coverage: Sufficient to Cover an Area of 3.6m² Installation: Simple to Cut for Spotlight and Corner Leveling Convenience : Convenient Installation for Precise Adjustments Protection: Heavy Duty Cardboard Edge Protectors Transit Safety: Safeguarding Boxes During Transit from Potential Damages Also Complete Ceiling Grid System Available (Sold Separately) Suitable For↓ Food Preparation Areas Hygienic Areas, Offices Cafes , Hospitals & Surgeries Kitchens & Restaurants Takeaway Areas & Domestic Use Areas Being Renovated Warehousing & Schools Shops, Changing Rooms & Retail Outlets Ceiling Expert Suspended Vinyl Ceiling Tiles 595mm x 595mm - EASYCLEAN & Wipeable Waterproof 595mm x 595mm x 7mm - Pack of 10 Tiles - Cover 3.6m2 Area Suitable For Food Preparation Areas Hygienic Areas Cafes Kitchens Takeaway Areas Areas Being Renovated Warehousing Shops Domestic Use Hospitals & Surgeries Changing Rooms & Retail Outlets Compatibility: Size 595mm x 595mm x 7mm - Fit into 600 x 600mm Grid System Transit Safety: Safeguarding Boxes During Transit from Potential Damages Product Inner Description Vinyl Gypsum Ceiling Tiles offer a blend of incombustible gypsum board, PVC facing, and Aluminum foil backing, making them ideal for indoor decorative applications, particularly in environments requiring cleanliness and dust-free conditions. The Aluminum foil backing provides thermal insulation properties, while the PVC facing offers versatility with various design choices. Square-cut and easily installable with a Suspended Ceiling Grid System, Vinyl Gypsum tiles find widespread use in commercial and institutional buildings such as offices, hospitals, schools, restaurants, and shops.
